home.empty_lookbook_subtitle: Create new styles from your wardrobe and see them here

photo_source: Where would you like to add from?
logout_body: Are you sure you want to log out?
delete_account_body:
All data will be permanently deleted.
This action cannot be undone.
profile_photo_upload_failed: Profile photo upload failed, try again.
privacy_policy_body: At Smart Wardrobe AI, we prioritize the security of your personal data.
privacy_policy_item1: • Your clothing photos are stored only in your wardrobe account.
privacy_policy_item2: • None of your personal data is shared with third parties.
privacy_policy_item3: • When you delete your account, all your data is permanently removed.
privacy_policy_item4: • Secure access is provided through JWT-based authentication.'
privacy_policy_contact: If you encounter any issues, you can contact us:
privacy_policy_faq: For frequently asked questions and usage instructions, you can visit our website.
privacy_policy_response_time: Our response time is usually 24 hours.
style_advisor_professional_description: A formal, clear, and corporate style. For office & business meetings.
style_advisor_friendly_description: Like an energetic and cheerful friend. Daily, fun suggestions.
style_advisor_harsh_description: No compromise. Bold, honest, and high-standard.
style_advisor_tone_description: Choose how the AI addresses you
